markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Alastair Adams for an Operations role, focusing on experience and fit.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Data-Driven Impact:** Built a Looker dashboard (BigQuery backend) that became Handshake's most-viewed report, directly informing sales strategy by revealing student/job market imbalances.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Automation Expertise:** Implemented Matic to automate CSM slide deck creation (saving 95% of time) and used Zapier for data-triggered alerts (e.g., low usage) to enable proactive customer success.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Proactive Problem-Solver:** Self-initiated the dashboard project to solve a vague "employer sentiment" problem, demonstrating a capacity to identify and define strategic data needs.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Strong Fit for Nascent Org:** Excited by the "blank slate" opportunity to build foundational ops for a services-to-platform transition, defining metrics and processes from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)

## Topics

### The Opportunity: Services-to-Platform Transition

  - [The company is evolving from a profitable services agency (\~60 clients) to a platform-based business.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [**Initial Focus:** Build foundational ops for the services side (e.g., client health tracking, playbooks).](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**Future Focus:** Support the new platform with data modeling, usage analytics, and insights.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [**Current State:** Client health tracking is subjective ("vibes"); metrics like churn and expansion are tracked, but a formal system is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [**Culture:** High autonomy is expected; the role requires self-management and identifying high-impact problems to solve.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

### Handshake Experience: Data & Automation

  - [**Context:** Handshake EMEA operations; role expanded from enablement to cover all go-to-market ops due to a US-based org gap.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Key Project: Student/Job Market Balance Dashboard**](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Problem:** Poor employer sentiment from low platform usage.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**Solution:** Built a Looker dashboard (BigQuery backend) analyzing student vs. job demand by location and major.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Impact:** Became the most-viewed dashboard, enabling sales to adapt strategy by targeting universities with in-demand majors or employers to fill student gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Key Project: CSM Slide Deck Automation**](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**Problem:** Manual CSM slide deck creation was time-consuming.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**Solution:** Implemented **Matic** to connect to the database and auto-populate slides.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**Impact:** Reduced deck creation time by 95% (from hours to \~2 minutes).](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Other Automation:** Used Zapier for data-triggered alerts (e.g., low usage) to enable proactive customer success.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Work Style & Feedback

  - [**Ideal Workday:** Focus on data analysis to generate insights and build strategic tools.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Performance Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
      - [**GM:** Reliable, trustworthy, and proactive in surfacing insights.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
      - [**Director:** Needs to improve visibility into work to increase perceived impact.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [**Recognition:** Won the "Move the Marketplace" award for the greatest org-wide impact.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [**Reason for Leaving:** Layoff from Handshake's EMEA team (90% reduction) as the company shifted focus to a new AI product.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget:** Discuss with Andy and send the take-home exercise to Alastair.](https://fathom.video/share/12PnuafGh6Yvyf3NAp1LyAdPKT13Vu7S?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
